events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need parse scenario. Residential job, piping & plumbing, material transitions, rough-complete. Observed field condition: no dielectric union copper-to-steel. Need identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Decision fail because non-compliant/dangerous? Risk maybe medium/high due galvanic corrosion, leaks. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete rough-complete maybe 60? value 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. confidence high. findings: missing dielectric union/isolation at copper-to-steel connection; galvanic corrosion risk. actions: install approved dielectric union or isolation fitting per manufacturer/IPC; separate dissimilar metals. rationale: copper and steel are dissimilar metals; direct connection causes galvanic corrosion, leaks, code violation. references: IPC (maybe 605.16? Actually IPC 2018 section 605.16 Dielectric fittings required between dissimilar metals; manufacturer listings). Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.

  "actions": [
    "Install an approved dielectric union or dielectric fitting between copper and steel piping",
    "Verify the fitting is listed for the application and sized per manufacturer instructions",

  ],
  "rationale": "Copper and steel are dissimilar metals; a direct connection without a dielectric union permits galvanic corrosion, which can thin the pipe wall and cause leaks. The IPC and manufacturer listings require a dielectric fitting at this transition, so the installation is defective and non-compliant.",

    "IPC - dielectric fittings required between dissimilar metals",
